fields.Name: Entity Records By Tag
fields.UserQuestion: Which records of a given entity have a specific tag?
fields.Description: Returns record IDs for a given entity that have a specific tag assigned, with relevance weight. Composable — join on RecordID to the target entity's primary key to enrich with full record data for tag-based filtering and drill-downs.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Filters vwTaggedItems by entity name and tag DisplayName, joining to vwTags to resolve the tag. Returns RecordID, Weight, and TaggedAt. Only includes Active tags. No ORDER BY for composability. Parameters: entityName (entity display name e.g. "Member Engagement Logs"), tagName (the tag's DisplayName to match e.g. "Law Enforcement Liability").
